description: 33. Retrieve the security labels of a group
examples:
Command Example
!tc-get-group-security-labels group_id=4579650 group_type=events
Context Example
{
"TC.Group.SecurityLabel": [
{
"DateAdded": "2016-08-31T00:00:00Z",
"Description": "This security label is used for information that is useful for the awareness of all participating organizations as well as with peers within the broader community or sector.",

!tc-get-group-security-labels group_id=4579650 group_type=events
Context Example
{
"TC.Group.SecurityLabel": [
{
"DateAdded": "2016-08-31T00:00:00Z",
"Description": "This security label is used for information that is useful for the awareness of all participating organizations as well as with peers within the broader community or sector.",
"GroupID": 4579650,
name: tc-get-group-security-labels

outputs.description: The name of the security label. TC.Group.SecurityLabel.Description The description of the security label.
outputs.name: TC.Group.SecurityLabel.Name

outputs.description: Date The date on which the security label was added.
outputs.name: TC.Group.SecurityLabel.DateAdded
